---
title: ""
author: ""
date: ""
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    documentclass: article
    classoption: [twocolumn, a4paper, 10pt]
    geometry: "top=1.5cm, bottom=2.0cm, left=1.8cm, right=1.8cm, columnsep=0.6cm, headheight=45pt, includehead, headsep=10pt"
    linestretch: 1.0
    cite-method: citeproc
    include-in-header:
      - file: assets/fp/preamble.tex
    include-before-body:
      - file: assets/fp/titleblock.tex
---



## References

::: {#refs}
:::
